notes: SHIP v1.14.206 — A-2 assistant-sheet buttons border-box->padding-box (completeness sweep off the .204/.205 discovery). AUDIT: enumerated every glass-system <button> consumer + checked for -webkit-appearance:none. Found 5 A-2 (.194) assistant buttons on the exact .ask broken pattern — border:transparent + border-box ring, NO appearance reset, raw <button>: .va-icard (the 4 SPEAK/PASTE/TYPE/IMPORT intent cards), .va-cask + .va-ldone (ASK PHANTOM / DONE), .va-cback (MENU back), .va-intake-chip (+ .va-ticket-on lit variant; the clipboard-deny fallback ATTACH chip). These last device-touched in .194 — BEFORE the border-box-on-button bug was known (.204) — so almost certainly rendering flat/edgeless on hardware. FIX: each gets appearance:none + a real colored ring (cyan via --glow-border one-knob for cask/lit-chip, slate for icard/back/base-chip) + padding-box glass (border-box layer dropped); .va-icard keeps its .va-iwell child well; inset glows/text-shadows preserved. NOT TOUCHED (confirmed rendering, would be churn): qa-btn + pt-btn-ghost/secondary (device-verified .190/.191/.198/.205 all-good; they render border-box — base rules supply appearance:none) · fr-go (comet ring via ::before/child plate, not border-box) · all pill-skin chips + gsk plates (divs, or verified). ROLLBACK: revert this commit. Gates: 4 blocks compile, braces balanced, CRLF, lockstep .205 -> .206. BATCH: appends to open .198-.206.
